name: verse-format
description: A conservative Verse formatter with configurable braced and colon block styles.

verseFormat.blockStyle.markdownDescription: Preferred Verse block style. `braced` converts recognized colon-plus-indentation blocks to braces. `colon` converts recognized braced blocks back to colon-plus-indentation blocks.

verseFormat.spacingStyle.markdownDescription: Preferred Verse spacing style. `wide` uses the formatter's readable spacing. `dense` uses compact spacing modeled after Epic's generated digest files.

verseFormat.emptyConstructionStyle.markdownDescription: Preferred formatting for empty construction and container expressions when `verseFormat.blockStyle` is `colon`. `braced` keeps forms such as `volume_device{}` and `array{}`. `colon` converts recognized empty expressions to colon style. Ignored when `verseFormat.blockStyle` is `braced`.

verseFormat.wrapMultiPropertyConstructio.description: Wrap inline aggregate expressions that exceed the configured construction, attribute, or array thresholds onto multiple lines.

verseFormat.maxInlineConstructionPropert.description: Maximum number of named properties to keep inline in construction expressions before wrapping.

verseFormat.maxInlineAttributeProperties.description: Maximum number of named properties to keep inline in attribute blocks before wrapping.

verseFormat.maxInlineArrayItems.description: Maximum number of array items to keep inline before wrapping.

verseFormat.finalNewline.description: Ensure formatted files end with a single newline.

scripts.test:uefn: pnpm run compile && vitest run --no-file-parallelism --maxWorkers=1 --maxConcurrency=1 test/uefnCompile.test.ts
